name: claude-lsp
description: Unified LSP plugin for Claude Code. Enables real-time code intelligence for any combination of languages — configure once, activate only what you need.

plugins.name: claude-lsp
plugins.description: Unified LSP plugin for Claude Code. Select which languages to enable via userConfig — rust, go, typescript, python, lua, c-cpp, java, ruby, php, html, css, yaml. Update settings and run /reload-plugins to apply changes.
